# Metla House Cleaning San Diego

> Metla House Cleaning is a locally owned residential cleaning company serving San Diego County since 2023. We operate two Google Business Profiles — Main San Diego covering greater San Diego County, and a dedicated La Jolla profile serving the coastal community. We specialize in deep cleaning, recurring standard cleaning, vacation rental turnovers, move-in/move-out cleaning, and post-construction cleaning. Licensed, insured, and background-checked. 4.9-star rated across 240+ Google reviews.

## About

Metla House Cleaning provides residential cleaning services throughout San Diego County with two operational bases:

- **Main San Diego**: General service area covering 30+ neighborhoods across the county. Phone (707) 414-8930.
- **La Jolla**: Coastal-focused service at 727-737 Pearl St, La Jolla, CA 92037. Phone (858) 267-4685. Specializes in oceanfront estates, vacation rentals, and coastal condos.

Our team consists of 1-2 experienced cleaners per visit (team size scales with home size, never by cramming more people into small spaces). Every cleaner is background-checked and trained on a detailed room-by-room process. We handle everything from single-visit deep cleans to recurring weekly and bi-weekly maintenance.

Hours: Monday–Sunday, 8:00 AM – 7:00 PM.

## Services

All services are available throughout our San Diego service area unless noted otherwise.

- [Standard Cleaning](https://www.metlahousecleaningsandiego.com/service/standard-cleaning): Regular recurring maintenance cleaning — weekly, bi-weekly, or monthly. Kitchen surfaces, bathroom sanitization, dusting, vacuuming, mopping, trash removal, and bed making. Best for homes that already have a baseline of cleanliness and need ongoing upkeep.
- [Deep Cleaning](https://www.metlahousecleaningsandiego.com/service/deep-cleaning): Thorough reset cleaning that includes everything in standard cleaning plus appliance exteriors, microwave (inside and out), baseboards, door frames, ceiling fans, blinds, light fixtures, window sills, and detailed bathroom sanitization. Recommended as a first-time clean or quarterly reset. Does NOT include inside fridge, inside oven, inside cabinets, or interior windows (available as add-ons).
- [Move-In / Move-Out Cleaning](https://www.metlahousecleaningsandiego.com/service/move-in-out-cleaning): Comprehensive cleaning for empty homes during property transitions. Includes everything in deep cleaning plus inside fridge, inside oven, inside all cabinets and drawers, and interior windows and sills. Designed to help renters and sellers present homes in pristine condition.
- [Vacation Rental Cleaning (Airbnb / VRBO)](https://www.metlahousecleaningsandiego.com/service/vacation-rental-cleaning-airbnb): Fast turnover cleaning between guest stays. Bathroom reset, kitchen deep clean, beds made with existing linens, towels folded, sand and debris removed from entryways and patios. Specialized for La Jolla and coastal San Diego short-term rentals.
- [Post-Construction Cleaning](https://www.metlahousecleaningsandiego.com/service/post-construction-cleaning): Debris, dust, and fine particulate removal after renovations, remodels, or new construction. Handles drywall dust, paint splatter, construction residue, and deep detail work on new surfaces.
- [Same-Day Cleaning](https://www.metlahousecleaningsandiego.com/same-day-cleaning): Urgent cleaning requests handled within the same day when scheduling allows. Subject to availability.

## Service Areas

Metla serves 30+ neighborhoods across San Diego County, organized by zone:

**Coastal Zone**: [La Jolla](https://www.metlahousecleaningsandiego.com/location/la-jolla), [Pacific Beach](https://www.metlahousecleaningsandiego.com/location/pacific-beach), [Ocean Beach](https://www.metlahousecleaningsandiego.com/location/ocean-beach), [Coronado](https://www.metlahousecleaningsandiego.com/location/coronado), [Del Mar](https://www.metlahousecleaningsandiego.com/location/del-mar), [Solana Beach](https://www.metlahousecleaningsandiego.com/location/solana-beach), [Encinitas](https://www.metlahousecleaningsandiego.com/location/encinitas)

**Urban Core**: [Hillcrest](https://www.metlahousecleaningsandiego.com/location/hillcrest), [North Park](https://www.metlahousecleaningsandiego.com/location/north-park), [Mission Hills](https://www.metlahousecleaningsandiego.com/location/mission-hills), [Mission Valley](https://www.metlahousecleaningsandiego.com/location/mission-valley), [Bay Park](https://www.metlahousecleaningsandiego.com/location/bay-park)

**North Inland**: [Scripps Ranch](https://www.metlahousecleaningsandiego.com/location/scripps-ranch), [Rancho Bernardo](https://www.metlahousecleaningsandiego.com/location/rancho-bernardo), [4S Ranch](https://www.metlahousecleaningsandiego.com/location/4s-ranch), [Poway](https://www.metlahousecleaningsandiego.com/location/poway), [Rancho Santa Fe](https://www.metlahousecleaningsandiego.com/location/rancho-santa-fe), [Escondido](https://www.metlahousecleaningsandiego.com/location/escondido), [University City](https://www.metlahousecleaningsandiego.com/location/university-city)

**East County**: [La Mesa](https://www.metlahousecleaningsandiego.com/location/la-mesa), [Mt. Helix](https://www.metlahousecleaningsandiego.com/location/mt-helix), [Granite Hills](https://www.metlahousecleaningsandiego.com/location/granite-hills), [Lemon Grove](https://www.metlahousecleaningsandiego.com/location/lemon-grove), [Allied Gardens](https://www.metlahousecleaningsandiego.com/location/allied-gardens), [College Area](https://www.metlahousecleaningsandiego.com/location/college-area-sd), [Rolando Village](https://www.metlahousecleaningsandiego.com/location/rolando-village-san-diego), [La Presa](https://www.metlahousecleaningsandiego.com/location/la-presa)

**South Bay**: [Bonita](https://www.metlahousecleaningsandiego.com/location/bonita), [Eastlake](https://www.metlahousecleaningsandiego.com/location/eastlake), [Otay Ranch](https://www.metlahousecleaningsandiego.com/location/otay-ranch)

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://www.metlahousecleaningsandiego.com/): Service overview, trust signals, and quick booking entry point.
- [Book a Cleaning](https://www.metlahousecleaningsandiego.com/booking): Online booking form with instant quote calculator.
- [About Us](https://www.metlahousecleaningsandiego.com/about): Company story, team background, licensing and insurance details.
- [All Services](https://www.metlahousecleaningsandiego.com/services): Complete service directory with descriptions and pricing guidance.
- [All Locations](https://www.metlahousecleaningsandiego.com/locations): Directory of every neighborhood we serve with location-specific landing pages.
- [Blog](https://www.metlahousecleaningsandiego.com/blog): 40+ articles covering cleaning guides, local area tips, pricing, and how-to content.
- [Current Specials](https://www.metlahousecleaningsandiego.com/specials): Active promotions including $40 off first clean and seasonal deep clean discounts.
- [FAQ](https://www.metlahousecleaningsandiego.com/faq): Answers to common questions about services, pricing, scheduling, and policies.
- [Policies](https://www.metlahousecleaningsandiego.com/policies): Service terms, cancellation policy, and customer expectations.
- [House Cleaning Overview](https://www.metlahousecleaningsandiego.com/house-cleaning): General house cleaning information page.
- [Same-Day Cleaning](https://www.metlahousecleaningsandiego.com/same-day-cleaning): Urgent booking page for same-day requests.
